race.comment: REGAL PROBLEM (13) tired quickly last start at Kembla Grange when thrown into the deep end in the G3 Classic. She now drops right back to a far more suitable assignment and sprints well at this trip. Perfectly placed to bounce straight back into the winner's circle. FEARED (15) has come back in terrific order this prep, putting two wins together at short odds. He's going far too well to ignore and gets his chance to bring up the hat-trick. ANDALE ANDALE (10) was a sharp improver here last start when closing off strongly to get the verdict. She'll drift back again from the wide draw but can cause some grief late if the tempo is genuine. SOLITARIO (4) only warmed into it late at Newcastle second-up, so the rise in trip looks ideal. From a middle draw he should blend in at the right time.
